title: External Examples Schema
description: Defines complete and partial external examples used by Specmatic tests and mocks. Tests use request values and expected response assertions, mocks match requests and return configured responses.

oneOf.description: Complete example in which all required fields are explicitly defined according to the API specification.
Partial example in which only selected fields are defined, omitted fields remain governed by the API specification.

AnyValue.title: Any Value
AnyValue.description: Any JSON object, array, literal scalar, or supported Specmatic expression. Object properties and array items are validated recursively.

oneOf.errorMessage: Expected an object, array, literal scalar, or supported Specmatic expression.

AnyObjectValue.title: Any Object Value
AnyObjectValue.description: A JSON object whose property values may recursively contain any supported value.

AnyArrayValue.title: Any Array Value
AnyArrayValue.description: A JSON array whose items may recursively contain any supported value.

AnyScalarValue.title: Any Literal Scalar Value
AnyScalarValue.description: Any literal JSON scalar. Strings recognized as Specmatic expressions are represented by the separate expression branch.

oneOf.errorMessage: Expected a literal JSON scalar, not a Specmatic expression.

SpecmaticExpression.title: Specmatic Expression
SpecmaticExpression.description: A complete Specmatic expression used in place of a scalar JSON value. Expression-specific validation is performed at load time.

oneOf.errorMessage: Expected a complete Specmatic expression: substitution, template value, matcher, or pattern token.

SpecmaticStringExpression.title: Specmatic String Expression
SpecmaticStringExpression.description: A complete Specmatic expression or a string containing supported substitution, template-value, or pattern-token syntax.

anyOf.description: A string containing a substitution lookup.
A string containing a substitution capture.
A string containing a pattern token.

SubstitutionCaptureExpression.title: Substitution Capture Expression
SubstitutionCaptureExpression.description: Captures a matched value under a name for later substitution.

SubstitutionLookupExpression.title: Substitution Lookup Expression
SubstitutionLookupExpression.description: Uses a previously captured value directly or through a data lookup.

TemplateValueExpression.title: Template Value Expression
TemplateValueExpression.description: Looks up one or more runtime values and falls back to a required default. The default may be any JSON value.

TemplateValueStringExpression.title: Template Value String Expression
TemplateValueStringExpression.description: A complete template value expression or a string containing template-value interpolation.

anyOf.description: A string containing a template value.

MatcherExpression.title: Matcher Expression
MatcherExpression.description: Matches a value using Specmatic matcher parameters such as exact, pattern, dataType, times, and value.

PatternTokenExpression.title: Pattern Token Expression
PatternTokenExpression.description: Uses a built-in Specmatic datatype or a contract-defined named pattern. Built-ins are number, integer, boolean, null, string, email, date, datetime, time, uuid, url, url-http, url-https, url-path, anything, and anyvalue.

SubstitutionOrTemplateOrMatcherExpressio.title: Substitution, Template, Or Matcher Expression
SubstitutionOrTemplateOrMatcherExpressio.description: A complete substitution, template-value, or matcher expression.

oneOf.errorMessage: Expected a complete substitution, template-value, or matcher expression.

SubstitutionOrTemplateOrMatcherStringExp.title: Substitution, Template, Or Matcher String Expression
SubstitutionOrTemplateOrMatcherStringExp.description: A complete substitution, template-value, or matcher expression, or a string containing substitution or template-value interpolation.

anyOf.description: A string containing a substitution lookup.
A string containing a substitution capture.

AnyValueWithSubstitutionOrTemplateOrMatc.title: Any Value With Substitution, Template, Or Matcher
AnyValueWithSubstitutionOrTemplateOrMatc.description: Any JSON object, array, literal scalar, substitution, template value, or matcher. Object properties and array items are validated recursively.

oneOf.errorMessage: Expected an object, array, literal scalar, or substitution, template-value, or matcher expression.

StringOrSubstitutionOrTemplateOrMatcherE.title: String Or Substitution, Template, Or Matcher Expression
StringOrSubstitutionOrTemplateOrMatcherE.description: A literal string or a substitution, template-value, or matcher expression, including supported interpolation within a string.

oneOf.errorMessage: Expected a literal string or a substitution, template-value, or matcher expression.

IntegerOrSubstitutionOrTemplateOrMatcher.title: Integer Or Substitution, Template, Or Matcher Expression
IntegerOrSubstitutionOrTemplateOrMatcher.description: A literal integer or a complete substitution, template-value, or matcher expression.

oneOf.errorMessage: Expected an integer or a complete substitution, template-value, or matcher expression.

TemplateValueOrSubstitutionLookupExpress.title: Template Value Or Substitution Lookup Expression
TemplateValueOrSubstitutionLookupExpress.description: A complete template value or substitution lookup expression. Substitution captures, matchers, and pattern tokens are not supported.

oneOf.errorMessage: Expected a complete template-value or substitution-lookup expression.

TemplateValueOrSubstitutionLookupStringE.title: Template Value Or Substitution Lookup String Expression
TemplateValueOrSubstitutionLookupStringE.description: A complete template value or substitution lookup expression, or a string containing template-value or substitution-lookup interpolation.

anyOf.description: A string containing a substitution lookup.

IntegerOrTemplateValueOrSubstitutionLook.title: Integer Or Template Value Or Substitution Lookup Expression
IntegerOrTemplateValueOrSubstitutionLook.description: A literal integer or a complete template value or substitution lookup expression. Other Specmatic expression types are not supported.

oneOf.errorMessage: Expected an integer or a complete template-value or substitution-lookup expression.

StringOrSpecmaticExpression.title: String Or Specmatic Expression
StringOrSpecmaticExpression.description: A literal string or a supported Specmatic expression, including supported interpolation within a string.

anyOf.errorMessage: Expected a literal string or a supported Specmatic expression.

StringOrTemplateValueExpression.title: String Or Template Value Expression
StringOrTemplateValueExpression.description: A literal string or a template value expression, including template-value interpolation within a string. Other Specmatic expression types are not supported.

oneOf.errorMessage: Expected a literal string or a template-value expression.

IntegerOrTemplateValueExpression.title: Integer Or Template Value Expression
IntegerOrTemplateValueExpression.description: A literal integer or a complete template value expression that resolves as the field value. Other Specmatic expression types are not supported.

oneOf.errorMessage: Expected an integer or a complete template-value expression.

BooleanOrTemplateValueExpression.title: Boolean Or Template Value Expression
BooleanOrTemplateValueExpression.description: A literal boolean or a complete template value expression that resolves as the field value. Other Specmatic expression types are not supported.

oneOf.errorMessage: Expected a boolean or a complete template-value expression.

Metadata.title: Example Metadata
Metadata.description: Metadata shared by complete and partial external examples.

name.description: Logical name of the example. If omitted, the external file name is used when a name is required.

transient.description: Mock-only flag that makes the expectation unavailable after its first successful match.

delay-in-seconds.description: Mock-only delay before returning the response, in whole seconds. If both delay fields are set, delay-in-milliseconds takes precedence.

delay-in-milliseconds.description: Mock-only delay before returning the response, in milliseconds. Takes precedence over delay-in-seconds.

http-stub-id.description: Mock-only identifier used to manage a transient expectation. When supplied, it replaces the automatically generated token.

Example.title: Complete Example
Example.description: Defines a complete interaction. Tests send the configured request and validate the response, mocks match the request and return the configured response. Fixtures run only during tests.

RequestResponseSchema.title: Request And Response Pair
RequestResponseSchema.description: Request and response represented by a complete or partial example.

PartialExample.title: Partial Example
PartialExample.description: Defines a partial interaction. Fields provided by the example are fixed, omitted fields remain governed by the API specification. Fixtures run only during tests.

partial.description: Request and response fields fixed by the partial example.

FixtureHooks.title: Fixture Hooks
FixtureHooks.description: Test-only fixtures that run before or after the contract test.

before.description: Fixtures run before the contract test. Defaults to an empty list.

after.description: Fixtures run after the contract test. Defaults to an empty list.

Fixture.title: Fixture
Fixture.description: A test-only fixture attached to a before or after hook. Currently, only HTTP fixtures are supported.

HttpFixture.title: HTTP Fixture
HttpFixture.description: A test-only fixture that calls an HTTP endpoint before or after a contract test and validates the response.

type.description: Identifies this as an HTTP fixture.

wait.description: Delay before the fixture call. Defaults to PT0S and must be an ISO 8601 duration.

oneOf.patternErrorMessage: Invalid duration format. Must be a valid ISO 8601 duration string (e.g., 'PT15M' or 'P2D') or a template-value/substitution-lookup expression.

timeout.description: Maximum duration allowed for the fixture call. Defaults to PT10S and must be an ISO 8601 duration.

oneOf.patternErrorMessage: Invalid duration format. Must be a valid ISO 8601 duration string (e.g., 'PT15M' or 'P2D') or a template-value/substitution-lookup expression.

retry.description: Retry policy used when the fixture call fails. If omitted, the call is attempted once.

executeFor.description: Selects which test scenarios run the fixture. If omitted, only positive scenarios run it.

http-request.description: Request sent to the fixture endpoint.

http-response.description: Expected response from the fixture endpoint.

Retry.title: Retry Policy
Retry.description: Retry policy for failed fixture calls. max-attempts counts retries after the initial call, so a value of 1 allows at most two total calls.

max-attempts.description: Maximum number of retries after the initial fixture call. Defaults to 1 when retry is present, total calls can therefore be up to max-attempts + 1.

delay.description: Delay before each retry. Defaults to PT0S and must be an ISO 8601 duration.

oneOf.patternErrorMessage: Invalid duration format. Must be a valid ISO 8601 duration string (e.g., 'PT15M' or 'P2D') or a template-value/substitution-lookup expression.

FixtureExecuteFor.title: Fixture Scenario Selector
FixtureExecuteFor.description: Selects which test scenarios run the fixture. Defaults to positive scenarios.

scenarios.description: Test scenarios that run the fixture. "positive" selects positive scenarios, "negative" selects negative scenarios, and "all" selects both.

oneOf.errorMessage: Expected one of 'all', 'positive', or 'negative', or a template-value/substitution-lookup expression.

HTTPFixtureRequest.title: HTTP Fixture Request
HTTPFixtureRequest.description: HTTP request sent to the fixture endpoint.

baseUrl.description: Base URL of the fixture endpoint.

method.description: HTTP method used for the fixture call.

path.description: Path invoked relative to the fixture endpoint base URL.

headers.description: Headers sent with the fixture request.

body.description: Request body sent by the fixture. Any JSON value is allowed.

HTTPFixtureResponse.title: HTTP Fixture Response
HTTPFixtureResponse.description: Expected HTTP response from the fixture endpoint.

status.description: Expected HTTP status of the fixture response.

body.description: Expected fixture response body. When provided, it is matched against the returned body.

PartialRequestResponseSchema.title: Partial Request And Response Pair
PartialRequestResponseSchema.description: Request and response fields fixed by a partial example. Omitted fields remain governed by the API specification.

RequestSchema.title: Example Request
RequestSchema.description: HTTP request represented by the example. Tests use it to construct the request; mocks use it as the matching criteria.

path.description: Request path represented by the example. May use supported template or matcher syntax.

method.description: HTTP method represented by the example, such as GET or POST.

query.description: Query parameters represented by the example. Values may use supported literal, template, or matcher syntax.

headers.description: Request headers represented by the example. Values may use supported literal, template, or matcher syntax.

body.description: Request body represented by the example. Any JSON value is allowed, including supported template or matcher values.

form-fields.description: Form fields represented by a form-encoded request. Values may use supported literal, template, or matcher syntax.

multipart-formdata.description: Multipart form-data parts represented by the request.

bodyRegex.description: Mock-only regular expression used to match the request body. It is interpreted as a regular expression, not a literal body.

ResponseSchema.title: Example Response
ResponseSchema.description: Response represented by the example. Tests use its status and any matcher values as response assertions, mocks return the configured response after the request matches.

status.description: Response status expected by tests and returned by mocks.

headers.description: Response headers returned by mocks. Tests validate header values expressed as matchers.

body.description: Response body returned by mocks. Tests validate body values expressed as matchers. Any JSON value is allowed.

externalisedResponseCommand.description: Mock-only executable that generates the response. The matched request is supplied through SPECMATIC_REQUEST, and the configured response body is ignored.

MultiPartFormData.title: Multipart Form Data Part
MultiPartFormData.description: Multipart form-data part represented by either inline content or a file reference.

MultiPartContent.title: Multipart Inline Content
MultiPartContent.description: Multipart form-data field represented by inline string content or null.

name.description: Name of the multipart form-data field.

content.description: Inline content of the multipart field.

contentType.description: Content-Type value for the inline multipart part.

MultiPartFile.title: Multipart File
MultiPartFile.description: Multipart form-data field represented by a file reference. The filename value must begin with @.

contentEncoding.description: Content-Encoding value for the multipart file part.

contentType.description: Content-Type value for the multipart file part.

filename.description: File reference for the multipart part. The value must begin with @, for example @order.pdf.

name.description: Name of the multipart form-data field.
